text: Fixes landed in 6372bd4: policy-leak restore in amatrix-y85, skip_if_not_installed(irlba)+workflow any::irlba, shared source-tree finder for both subprocess regression files, chol_factor NA/NaN guard, em-dash escape, all undoc'd methods documented (incl. 4 extra [<- signatures tools::undoc found), \method usage markup. Local: devtools::test 3543/0; tools::undoc/checkDocFiles/codoc/checkS3methods clean on temp-lib install. REMAINING: confirm the pushed R-CMD-check Actions run goes green on all 4 platform jobs, then close.
